narrative:
category_one_description: The applicant seeks proposals for fiber-based Internet access services to support connectivity across the school campus. Vendors may propose Dedicated Internet Access (DIA) or equivalent broadband Internet access services with bandwidth options ranging from 1 Gbps to 2 Gbps, including installation, activation, and ongoing service support. Solutions must provide reliable and scalable connectivity suitable for instructional and administrative use.
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 1024.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 2048.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: YESHIVA OF CENTRAL QUEENS FY 2026 C1&2
